title: rootless run podman commit error: operation not permitted
body:
### Issue Description
podman version is: ```4.9.3```
ubuntu os is: ```24.04.2 LTS```

when i using rootless user to build image from shared image , however it throws errors with ```chown xxx : operation not permitted``` 

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. create shared image
```
REPOSITORY                        TAG                      IMAGE ID      CREATED            SIZE        R/O
docker.io/library/ollama-qwen3    1.7bv2                   4161fcab7475  31 hours ago       4.82 GB     true
docker.io/library/ollama-qwen3    1.7b                     d36be0951e79  46 hours ago       3.46 GB     true
docker.io/nvidia/cuda             11.0.3-base-ubuntu20.04  97dfa1ef5ee7  19 months ago      125 MB      true
```
2. create test1 user and run a container from shared image
```
adduser test1
sudo -u test1 podman run -it -d --device nvidia.com/gpu=0 --device nvidia.com/gpu=1 --name  ollama-qwen3  docker.io/library/ollama-qwen3:1.7bv2
```
3. run commit to build test1 private image from ```ollama-qwen3``` container
```
sudo -u test1 podman --log-level trace commit ollama-qwen3 docker.io/library/ollama-qwen330:1.7bv3
``` 
4. shared images owner is root
```
drwxr-xr-x  5 root root 4096 Jun 23 11:45 37bc415a08495bed7c8fb963e54c680514421efa953b4248216ce735bbfff5c0/
drwxr-xr-x  6 root root 4096 Jun 23 11:34 470b66ea5123c93b0d5606e4213bf9e47d3d426b640d32472e4ac213186c4bb6/

drwxr-xr-x  4 root root 4096 Jun 25 07:49 ff3961ec1b94ac0643df7d00c814093d42b915d994bfc5cadf861cf743be589f/
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root root    5 Jun 23 11:33 .has-mount-program*
drwxr-xr-x  2 root root 4096 Jun 25 02:57 l/
```


### Describe the results you received

throw errors reference above

### Describe the results you expected

build successfully

Additional environment details

### Additional information

comments.body:
how have you configured the shared storage?

Have you set `force_mask = "shared"`?

Do the files in the shared storage have extended attributes storing their real owner (use getfattr -d -m .*  on some image files under `/opt/containers/storage`)?

> Have you set `force_mask = "shared"`?
> 
> Do the files in the shared storage have extended attributes storing their real owner (use getfattr -d -m .* on some image files under `/opt/containers/storage`)?

no，we set nothing
so that is expected to fail, without that setting rootless podman cannot access the files in the shared storage

we change storage config using force_mask option:
```
[storage]
driver = "overlay"

[storage.options]
additionalimagestores = ["/var/lib/shared-storage"]

[storage.options.overlay]
force_mask="shared"
mount_program = "/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs"

```

however, it throw error when run container, like:
command is:  ```sudo -u user1 podman run -it -d  --name test22 quay.io/travelping/nettools:v1.12.0```
```
\Error: container create failed (no logs from conmon): conmon bytes "": readObjectStart: expect { or n, but found , error found in #0 byte of ...||..., bigger context ...||...
```

You need to set that for the shared storage, so the force_mask must go in `/etc/containers/storage.conf`, then you need to pull again the images you want to share and run `chmod -R 755 /var/lib/shared-storage`.

For more details, you can take a look here: https://www.redhat.com/en/blog/image-stores-podman

> You need to set that for the shared storage, so the force_mask must go in `/etc/containers/storage.conf`, then you need to pull again the images you want to share and run `chmod -R 755 /var/lib/shared-storage`.

```

drwxr-xr-x  5 root  root  4096 Jun 23 11:45 e799d45e7a7ab6f0d08afbc023d88c929653d9dcaf28c5abd39f1090d68759e0/

-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  root     5 Jun 23 11:33 .has-mount-program*
drwxr-xr-x  2 root  root  4096 Jun 25 02:57 l/
```

we changed，but run podman commit within test1 user， it always throws error, force_mask affect nothing：
```
Error: copying layers and metadata for container "7d856ba5d90aecf0268fe822dbb4c50404d939a86634c9edcc785d69e0560336": initializing source containers-storage:test1: extracting layer "ab50645f1d9fbd86250ee54c6ff440a74b307bcadad2483968fcab1d2281f2c0": chown /opt/containers/storage/overlay/ff3961ec1b94ac0643df7d00c814093d42b915d994bfc5cadf861cf743be589f/diff: operation not permitted
```
I missed the podman version you've used.  That is too old and not supported upstream, there were many fixes since then so please use an updated version
thanks for remind, i'll try it and reply later
@giuseppe thank you very much, it work normally now with podman version ```v5.5.2``` , and thanks again
